greeting.confirmBody: Before we continue, please confirm this is your business.
greeting.title: Hi {name}!
greeting.body: We've prepared a short interactive interview to understand {company} and shape the right online solution for your business. It takes 10–15 minutes and you can pause anytime.

phase_0.title: Tell us about your business
phase_0.helper: A short intake so we can personalize everything that follows.
phase_0.placeholder: What do you do? What's working? What's costing you time or customers?

phase_1.title: Business Profile
phase_1.helper: Confirm your details and pick your category.
phase_1.placeholder: Business profile content lands in session S2.2.

phase_2.title: Services
phase_2.helper: Choose the services you're interested in.
phase_2.placeholder: Service selection lands in session S2.3.

phase_3.title: Branding & Look/Feel
phase_3.helper: Tell us about the style you want.
phase_3.placeholder: Branding phase lands in session S2.4.

phase_4.title: Content & Social
phase_4.placeholder: Content & social phase lands in session S2.5.

phase_5.title: Growth & Operations
phase_5.helper: Notifications, marketing, lead-gen and ops tooling.
phase_5.placeholder: Growth & operations phase lands in session S2.5.

phase_6.title: Budget & Timeline
phase_6.placeholder: Budget & timeline phase lands in session S2.6.

review.title: Review your specification
review.helper: We'll compile everything into a specification for you to review.
review.placeholder: The real specification preview lands in session S3.5.

phase0.placeholder1: What do you do? What's working? What's costing you time or customers?
phase0.placeholder2: Tell us about your customers — who they are, how they find you, what they keep asking for.
phase0.placeholder3: What would you fix about your business tomorrow if you could?
phase0.hint1: Most of my customers come from word of mouth.
phase0.hint2: I lose time answering the same questions every day.
phase0.hint3: I want customers to find and book us online.
phase0.guided_offer: What does your business offer, and to whom?
phase0.guided_channels: How do customers currently find and book/buy from you?
phase0.guided_frustrations: What frustrates you most day-to-day (admin, no-shows, marketing, visibility…)?
phase0.guided_success: What would success online look like in 6–12 months? What makes you better than competitors?

phase1.categoryHeading: What kind of business do you run?
phase1.otherDescription: Describe your business in a few words
phase1.otherHint: We'll flag this for a quick manual review.
phase1.requiredHint: Pick a category and niche (or describe your own) to continue.
phase1.dcpFailedBody: We couldn't analyze your description automatically. You can retry, or simply continue — everything works without it.

phase2.catalogHeading: Choose the services you're interested in
phase2.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.
phase2.featurePlaceholder: Add a feature and press Enter
phase2.notePlaceholder: Anything to add or change about this?
phase2.referenceLinksHint: Sites or apps whose functionality you like — for inspiration only, never shared back as a recommendation.

suggestions.notePlaceholder: Add a note or tweak this…
suggestions.optIn: Optional — we'll only suggest when you ask.
suggestions.unavailable: AI suggestions are temporarily unavailable — continue manually.

phase3.styleHeading: Which styles feel right for your brand?
phase3.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.
phase3.useLogoColorsNoLogo: No logo on file yet — ask your admin contact to add one.
phase3.useLogoColorsError: Couldn't extract colors from your logo.
phase3.uploadsHeading: Upload your logo, images or documents
phase3.uploadTooLarge: {name} is larger than 15MB and wasn't uploaded.
phase3.referenceLinksSubheading: Websites or social pages whose look, layout or functionality you like.
phase3.referenceLinkNotePlaceholder: What do you like about it?

phase4.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.
phase4.socialPlatformsLabel: Which platforms do you use or want?
phase4.otherPlatformsPlaceholder: Add a platform and press Enter
phase4.cadenceLabel: How often would you like to post?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Reminders, confirmations and follow-ups.
notifications.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.

marketing.title: Marketing & retention
marketing.subtitle: Stay in touch and bring customers back.
marketing.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.

leadgen.title: Lead generation
leadgen.subtitle: Where do you believe new customers come from?
leadgen.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.
leadgen.managedServiceLabel: Interested in a managed lead-generation service?

admin_ops.title: Admin & operations tooling
admin_ops.subtitle: Run the day-to-day more smoothly.
admin_ops.aiSuggestionsComingSoon: Coming soon — AI suggestions land in a later session.

phase6.billingHeading: How would you like to pay for this?

build_support.title: Build + monthly support
build_support.description: Bugs, small features, managed hosting & monitoring.

saas_subscription.title: Service subscription
saas_subscription.description: Pay monthly for the solution as a managed service.

advise_me.title: Not sure — advise me
advise_me.description: We'll recommend the best fit once we review your specification.

phase6.billingRequiredHint: Choose a billing model to continue — or pick "Not sure — advise me".
phase6.timelineHeading: When would you like to launch?
phase6.timelineNotePlaceholder: e.g. Needs to launch before the summer season

review.amendPlaceholder: Describe what you'd like to adjust about the specification...
review.amendComingSoon: Coming soon — AI-assisted amendments land in a later session.
review.dcpPending: A deeper goals & pain-points summary will appear here once the AI intake analysis is live.

sections.openQuestions: 10. Open questions for the discovery call

openQuestions.scope: Confirm the final scope and any must-have integrations.
openQuestions.timeline: Confirm how flexible the launch timeline really is.
openQuestions.integrations: Any existing tools or data that need to carry over?

submit.confirmBody: We'll start reviewing your specification and get back to you soon.
submit.closingBody: We're reviewing your specification and will get back to you within a few business days with a tailored assessment and proposal.
